  {{HIGH_COUNT}}        Required. Number of high findings.
  {{MEDIUM_COUNT}}      Required. Number of medium findings.
  {{LOW_COUNT}}         Required. Number of low findings.
  {{AC_ROWS?}}          Optional. One row per acceptance criterion when task-scoped.
  {{FINDINGS}}          Required. One section per finding.
  {{POSITIVES?}}        Optional. Things done well worth noting.
  {{SUMMARY}}           Required. Overall assessment and next steps.
-->
